summary: Payroll Canada and Any Minute Timesheet Integration - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend API integration verified via pytest (15 passed, 3 skipped). Frontend UI verified via Playwright - login, pay periods, import timesheets with preview, employees with external keys.

ui_bugs.issue: Unmatched employee shows 'undefined undefined' for name when employee_name is missing from Any Minute response

passed_tests: API Health: Payroll Canada API healthy
API Health: Any Minute API healthy
Payroll API: GET /api/am/payroll/employees with X-PAYROLL-KEY returns employee list
Payroll API: GET /api/am/payroll/approved-entries returns approved timesheet entries for date range
Payroll API: Invalid API key returns 401
Payroll API: Missing API key returns 401/422
Payroll API: POST /api/am/payroll/lock locks approved timesheets
Auth: Payroll Canada admin login works (admin@test.com / test123)
Pay Periods: GET returns list of pay periods
Pay Periods: POST creates new pay period
Timesheets: Preview fetches data from Any Minute API with matched/unmatched breakdown
Timesheets: Import creates time entries in Payroll Canada database
Timesheets: Time entries linked correctly to matched employees by external_employee_key
Employees: GET returns employees with external_employee_key mapping (EMP001-EMP008)
Employee Mapping: Sarah Johnson (EMP001) matches Any Minute user with employee_mapping_key: EMP001
Frontend: Login page loads and authenticates correctly
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (employees, open periods, pending imports)
Frontend: Pay Periods page shows existing periods with status
Frontend: Import Timesheets preview shows matched entries (Sarah Johnson with 37.5 hours)
Frontend: Import Timesheets shows unmatched entries (admin@anyminute.com)
Frontend: Employees page shows all 8 employees with external keys
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ImportTimesheets.js line 104 - employee_name falls back to concatenating first/last name but doesn't handle missing fields, causing 'undefined undefined' display

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed, 3 skipped due to locked pay period)

seed_data_creation: Created pay period for Feb 1-15 2026, imported 5 timesheet entries for Sarah Johnson from Any Minute
context_for_next_testing_agent: Integration between Payroll Canada and Any Minute is fully working. Key mappings: EMP001 -> Sarah Johnson. USE_MOCK=false in backend/.env enables real API calls. Test the full workflow: create pay period -> preview timesheets (fetches from Any Minute) -> import -> create payroll run -> calculate. The demo/generate endpoint clears all payroll data, so use it carefully.

employee_matching.strategy: Match by external_employee_key (EMP001, EMP002, etc.) or email
employee_matching.verified_match: EMP001 in Payroll Canada -> EMP001 in Any Minute
